prompts.title: Create an instrument track and musical idea
prompts.prompt: Create a new instrument track, add a short MIDI clip near the start, and write a simple 2-bar musical idea into it. Tell me the track id, clip id, and what notes you added.

prompts.title: Build a chord progression from a key/style
prompts.prompt:
Build a 4-chord progression in the key and style I describe below. Create (or reuse) a MIDI clip and write the chords as sustained notes, one chord per bar. Ask me for the key and style if I did not give them.

Key/style:

prompts.title: Humanize selected MIDI
prompts.prompt: Apply subtle timing and velocity humanization to the currently selected MIDI notes. Keep it musical, not random. Report exactly what changed.

prompts.title: Quantize selected notes with a groove
prompts.prompt: Quantize the selected MIDI notes to a 1/16 grid with a light swing/groove and partial strength so it does not sound robotic. Report the strength and grid you used.

prompts.title: Legato / fix overlaps / clean duplicate notes
prompts.prompt: Clean up the selected MIDI: make it legato, fix overlapping notes, and remove exact duplicate notes. Report how many notes were affected.

prompts.title: Gain-stage the project
prompts.prompt: Review the track and master levels and propose gain-staging changes so nothing clips and there is healthy headroom. Show me the plan before applying any level changes.

prompts.title: Build bus/send routing
prompts.prompt:
Create a bus and route the tracks I describe to it, then add a send where it makes sense. Explain the routing you created. Ask me which tracks to group if I did not say.

Tracks to group:

prompts.title: Add and configure sidechain compression
prompts.prompt:
Add a compressor to the target track and configure it for sidechain ducking from the source track I name. Report the instance id and the settings you chose.

Target track / source track:

prompts.title: Find and assign a suitable VST
prompts.prompt:
Search the plugin registry for a plugin matching what I describe below, then add it to the track I name. Confirm what you assigned. Ask me if the intent is ambiguous.

What I want / target track:

prompts.title: Diagnose why a track is silent
prompts.prompt:
Investigate why the track I name is producing no sound. Check mute/solo, volume, routing, plugin bypass, and whether it has any clips. Report the likely cause and a fix, but do not change anything until I approve.

Track:

prompts.title: Recreate unresolved plugins
prompts.prompt: List the project's unresolved plugins and propose how to recreate or replace each one from the current registry. Show the plan before making changes.

prompts.title: Project health report (read-only)
prompts.prompt: Give me a read-only health report of this project: track/clip counts, unresolved plugins, tracks with no output, obvious level or routing issues, and anything that looks broken. Do not modify anything.

prompts.title: Prepare a mix/export checklist
prompts.prompt: Walk the project and prepare a pre-export checklist: levels/headroom, obvious mix problems, unresolved plugins, and loop/marker setup. Present it as a checklist; do not change anything yet.
